title: trianthema corallicola
intro: Trianthema corallicola, also known as horse purslane or silver purslane, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Aizoaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, as well as being used to treat gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of Trianthema corallicola include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are typically made by boiling the leaves and stems in water or mixing them with oils and other herbs.
